warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Band Row Rotate Press
Banded Lat Stretch
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Hang Power Clean
3 Tall Clean
10 Strict Press

strength.name: Clean Pull
strength.description:
1x3 | * 3 count to knee
* Focus on hip pop & Triple Extension
* Shrug and let elbows float | Work Up to a Top Set of 3. Increase weight if it is feeling good or dial it in for another set.
00:00 3
02:00 3
04:00 3
06:00 3
08:00 3

strength.name: Clean
strength.description:
3x2 | * If you catch high, squat it
* Focus on triple extension
* Fast Elbows | E3MOM 18min
BUILD 1 Sets
00:00 3 @ 55%
03:00 3 @ 65%
06:00 2 @ 75%
09:00 2 @ 85%
HOLD 3 Sets
09:00 2 @ 90%
12:00 2 @ 90%
15:00 2 @ 90%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
In time Remaining Attempt your heaviest complex
1 Power Clean
1 Hang Clean (Power or Full)
1 Clean

hypertrophy.reasoning: Clean complex heavily taxes quads, glutes, and front delts; accessory work builds posterior chain and arm strength without CNS interference.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Clean Pull, 1 by 3. Strength: Clean, 3 by 2 at 90 percent. Metcon: Workout: In time Remaining Attempt your heaviest complex, 1 Power Clean, 1 Hang Clean (Power or Full), 1 Clean. For hypertrophy, focus on back (rows), arms (biceps/triceps), shoulders (rear delt).
